gojoseon.name: Gojoseon
gojoseon.summary: The first nation founded by Dangun Wanggeom — the origin of the Korean people.

proto-three-kingdoms.name: Proto-Three Kingdoms
proto-three-kingdoms.summary: The transitional age when tribal confederacies grew into kingdoms.

three-kingdoms.name: Three Kingdoms
three-kingdoms.summary: Goguryeo, Baekje, and Silla contend for the Korean peninsula.

unified-silla.name: Unified Silla
unified-silla.summary: Silla unified the peninsula and Buddhist culture flourished.

balhae.name: Balhae
balhae.summary: Founded by Goguryeo refugees, Balhae rose as the "Prosperous Land of the East."

goryeo.name: Goryeo
goryeo.summary: A Buddhist kingdom that produced the world's first metal movable type and the Tripitaka Koreana.

joseon.name: Joseon
joseon.summary: Founded by Yi Seong-gye, a Confucian state of 500 years that created Hangeul.

daehan.name: Korean Empire
daehan.summary: A brief, intense bid for an independent modern nation.

japanese-rule.name: Japanese Colonial Period
japanese-rule.summary: 35 years of Japanese rule and a relentless independence movement.

liberation.name: Liberation & Division
liberation.summary: The joy of liberation and the tragedy of national division.

korean-war.name: Korean War
korean-war.summary: The nation's greatest tragedy — three years of war and an armistice.

modern.name: Modern Korea
modern.summary: From ruins to miracle — democracy and the rise of modern Korea.
